items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement for validating parallel signature routing is not directly supported by the evidence provided. The linked use case describes a sequential routing process without confirming the implementation of parallel routing for signatures. Additionally, the prior step evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that would validate the requirement of parallel signature routing, leading to an inconclusive status.
